title: lathyrus holochlorus
intro: Lathyrus holochlorus, also known as the spring vetchling or spring pea, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus holochlorus include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and have antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus holochlorus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and immune function.
